_comment: Shared golden vectors for the re-auth threshold. Loaded by BOTH suites if the
Android side adopts them; the arithmetic is identical (elapsedRealtime on
Android, systemUptime on iOS). All times in SECONDS. thresholdSeconds is 30 on
both platforms; it is repeated here so a vector is self-contained and a change
to the constant on one side shows up as a vector mismatch on the other.
backgroundedAt null means the app never left the foreground this session.

requiresReauth.description: backgrounded a moment ago: no prompt
one second under the threshold: no prompt
a backwards reading is not trusted to unlock
